languages.text: "Напротив, Вольный Торговец. Демонический мир, сотворенный на планете с такой инфраструктурой, станет горнилом, из которого каждодневно в мир будут вступать сотни и тысячи орудий Истины. Когда метаморфоза будет завершена, Кьява Гамма станет жемчужиной в ожерелье Последнего восхода".

traits.locale_text: "Напротив, Вольный Торговец. Демонский мир, сотворенный на планете с такой инфраструктурой, станет горнилом, из которого каждодневно в мир будут вступать сотни и тысячи орудий Истины... когда метаморфоза будет завершена, Кьява Гамма станет жемчужиной в ожерелье планет Последнего восхода".

"Напротив, Вольный Торговец. Демонический мир, сотворенный на планете с такой инфраструктурой, станет горнилом, из которого каждодневно в мир будут вступать сотни и тысячи орудий Истины. Когда метаморфоза будет завершена, Кьява Гамма станет жемчужиной в ожерелье Последнего восхода".

languages.text: "Quite the contrary, Rogue Trader. A daemonic world spawned from a planet with such infrastructure will become a foundry releasing hundreds and thousands of engines of Truth into the world every passing day. Once the metamorphosis is complete, Kiava Gamma will become the jewel in the necklace that is the Final Dawn."
languages.original_text: "Напротив, Вольный Торговец. Демонический мир, сотворенный на планете с такой инфраструктурой, станет горнилом, из которого каждодневно в мир будут вступать сотни и тысячи орудий Истины. Когда метаморфоза будет завершена, Кьява Гамма станет жемчужиной в ожерелье Последнего восхода".

traits.locale_text: "Quite the contrary, Rogue Trader. A demonic world spawned from a planet with such infrastructure will become a foundry that releases hundreds and thousands of Truth engines into the world every passing day. Once the metamorphosis is complete, Kiava Gamma will become the jewel in the necklace that is Final Dawn."

"Quite the contrary, Rogue Trader. A demonic world spawned from a planet with such infrastructure will become a foundry that releases hundreds and thousands of Truth engines into the world every passing day. Once the metamorphosis is complete, Kiava Gamma will become the jewel in the necklace that is Final Dawn."

"Quite the contrary, Rogue Trader. A daemonic world spawned from a planet with such infrastructure will become a foundry releasing hundreds and thousands of engines of Truth into the world every passing day. Once the metamorphosis is complete, Kiava Gamma will become the jewel in the necklace that is the Final Dawn."

A daemonic world spawned from a planet with such infrastructure will become a foundry releasing hundreds and thousands of engines of Truth into the world every passing day. Once the metamorphosis is complete, Kiava Gamma will become the jewel in the necklace that is the Final Dawn."

"Quite the contrary, Rogue Trader. A daemonic world spawned from a planet with such infrastructure will become a foundry releasing hundreds and thousands of engines of Truth into the world every passing day. Once the metamorphosis is complete, Kiava Gamma will become the jewel in the necklace that is the Final Dawn."

languages.text: "Ganz im Gegenteil, Rogue Trader. Eine dämonische Welt, die aus einem Planeten mit einer solchen Infrastruktur hervorgeht, wird zu einer Gießerei, die jeden Tag Hunderttausende von Maschinen der Wahrheit in die Welt entlässt. Sobald die Metamorphose abgeschlossen ist, wird Kiava Gamma das Juwel in der Halskette der Endzeit sein."
languages.original_text: "Quite the contrary, Rogue Trader. A daemonic world spawned from a planet with such infrastructure will become a foundry releasing hundreds and thousands of engines of Truth into the world every passing day. Once the metamorphosis is complete, Kiava Gamma will become the jewel in the necklace that is the Final Dawn."

traits.locale_text: "Ganz im Gegenteil, Rogue Trader. Eine dämonische Welt, die aus einem Planeten mit einer solchen Infrastruktur hervorgeht, wird zu einer Gießerei, die jeden Tag Hunderttausende von Maschinen der Wahrheit in die Welt entlässt. Sobald die Metamorphose abgeschlossen ist, wird Kiava Gamma das Juwel in der Halskette der Endzeit sein."

languages.text: "Bien au contraire, Rogue Trader. Un monde démoniaque issu d'une planète dotée d'une telle infrastructure deviendra une fonderie libérant des centaines et des milliers de moteurs de Vérité dans le monde chaque jour qui passe. Une fois la métamorphose achevée, Kiava Gamma deviendra le joyau du collier qu'est l'Aube Finale."
languages.original_text: "Quite the contrary, Rogue Trader. A daemonic world spawned from a planet with such infrastructure will become a foundry releasing hundreds and thousands of engines of Truth into the world every passing day. Once the metamorphosis is complete, Kiava Gamma will become the jewel in the necklace that is the Final Dawn."

traits.locale_text: "Bien au contraire, Rogue Trader. Un monde démoniaque issu d'une planète dotée d'une telle infrastructure deviendra une fonderie libérant des centaines et des milliers de moteurs de Vérité dans le monde chaque jour qui passe. Une fois la métamorphose achevée, Kiava Gamma deviendra le joyau du collier qu'est l'Aube Finale."

languages.text: "Todo lo contrario, Rogue Trader. Un mundo daemónico engendrado a partir de un planeta con semejante infraestructura se convertirá en una fundición que liberará cientos y miles de motores de la Verdad en el mundo cada día que pase. Una vez completada la metamorfosis, Kiava Gamma se convertirá en la joya del collar que es el Amanecer Final".
languages.original_text: "Quite the contrary, Rogue Trader. A daemonic world spawned from a planet with such infrastructure will become a foundry releasing hundreds and thousands of engines of Truth into the world every passing day. Once the metamorphosis is complete, Kiava Gamma will become the jewel in the necklace that is the Final Dawn."

traits.locale_text: "Todo lo contrario, Rogue Trader. Un mundo daemónico engendrado a partir de un planeta con semejante infraestructura se convertirá en una fundición que liberará cientos y miles de motores de la Verdad en el mundo cada día que pase. Una vez completada la metamorfosis, Kiava Gamma se convertirá en la joya del collar que es el Amanecer Final".

languages.text: "Tam tersine, Haydut Tüccar. Böyle bir altyapıya sahip bir gezegenden doğan daemonik bir dünya, her geçen gün dünyaya yüzlerce ve binlerce Hakikat motoru salan bir dökümhane haline gelecektir. Metamorfoz tamamlandığında Kiava Gama, Son Şafak olan kolyedeki mücevher haline gelecektir."
languages.original_text: "Quite the contrary, Rogue Trader. A daemonic world spawned from a planet with such infrastructure will become a foundry releasing hundreds and thousands of engines of Truth into the world every passing day. Once the metamorphosis is complete, Kiava Gamma will become the jewel in the necklace that is the Final Dawn."

Metamorfoz tamamlandığında Kiava Gama, Son Şafak olan kolyedeki mücevher haline gelecektir."
